Phase 3 Project
Domain: Business (Bank Marketing)
Dataset: Bank Marketing Dataset (UCI Machine Learning Repository)
Github: DS_Avengers_Bank_Marketing
Project Overview
This project focuses on using classification and regression techniques to analyze the Bank
Marketing dataset from a Portuguese banking institution. The dataset captures results of
direct marketing campaigns (via phone calls) where the main goal was to determine
whether a client would subscribe to a term deposit. Using the R programming language,
we aim to build predictive models that will support decision-making in future marketing
campaigns.
